title: A gas-rich outback station could host a $28bn off-grid AI data centre
summary: Project Ares is one of roughly a dozen data-centre proposals now lodged across the Territory, alongside Energy North’s own Project Sol, a green hydrogen and ammonia venture at an earlier stage.
